peaceful_silence.description: A warm, enveloping silence of absolute safety and trust.
peaceful_silence.narrative_effect: Deepens the bond; characters feel they can be their truest versions of themselves.

lonely_silence.description: A cold, hollow silence that emphasizes distance or an unsaid words.
lonely_silence.narrative_effect: Highlights the gap between characters or a character's internal solitude.

expectant_silence.description: A charged, vibrating silence where something is about to be realized or spoken.
expectant_silence.narrative_effect: Builds a bridge toward a moment of connection or revelation.

melancholic_silence.description: A heavy, soft silence layered with nostalgia or a gentle sadness.
melancholic_silence.narrative_effect: Adds emotional depth and a sense of passing time or lost things.
